news.title:
MTNL discloses default on principal and interest payments totaling INR 9,188 Cr.
Total financial indebtedness of MTNL stands at INR 36,216 Cr, including loans and bonds.
news.summary:
MTNL discloses default on principal and interest payments totaling INR 9,188 Cr.
Total financial indebtedness of MTNL stands at INR 36,216 Cr, including loans and bonds.

news.title:
MTNL's 6th semi-annual interest payment on 7.75 bonds due 24 Mar 2026; escrow funding delayed.
Bonds are sovereign-guaranteed by Govt. of India; guarantee can be invoked if default occurs.
news.summary:
MTNL's 6th semi-annual interest payment on 7.75 bonds due 24 Mar 2026; escrow funding delayed.
Bonds are sovereign-guaranteed by Govt. of India; guarantee can be invoked if default occurs.

news.title:
MTNL recorded the poorest performance in TRAI's Jan network test in Mumbai.
The test assessed mobile network performance in urban, crowded, and transport areas.
news.summary:
MTNL recorded the poorest performance in TRAI's Jan network test in Mumbai.
The test assessed mobile network performance in urban, crowded, and transport areas.

news.title:
MTNL funds escrow for 7.51% interest on Bonds VIIID, due 6 March 2026.
Funding executed via Bank of India on 4 March 2026.
news.summary:
MTNL funds escrow for 7.51% interest on Bonds VIIID, due 6 March 2026.
Funding executed via Bank of India on 4 March 2026.

news.title:
MTNL faces fines of Rs. 5.4L by NSE and BSE for board composition non-compliance under SEBI LODR.
MTNL seeks waiver, citing appointments by DoT; financial operations remain unaffected by fines.
news.summary:
MTNL faces fines of Rs. 5.4L by NSE and BSE for board composition non-compliance under SEBI LODR.
MTNL seeks waiver, citing appointments by DoT; financial operations remain unaffected by fines.

news.title:
MTNL's bonds and NCDs retain Crisil AAA(CE) rating, on watch negative since Sept 2024.
Rating reflects government guarantee, trustee support; monitoring payment adherence continues.
news.summary:
MTNL's bonds and NCDs retain Crisil AAA(CE) rating, on watch negative since Sept 2024.
Rating reflects government guarantee, trustee support; monitoring payment adherence continues.

news.title:
Mahanagar Telephone Nigam cannot pay interest for Bond Series VIIID due March 6, 2026, due to insufficient escrow funds.
A default on this payment will activate the government's sovereign guarantee.
news.summary:
Mahanagar Telephone Nigam cannot pay interest for Bond Series VIIID due March 6, 2026, due to insufficient escrow funds.
A default on this payment will activate the government's sovereign guarantee.

news.title:
MTNL funds escrow account for 5th semi-annual bond interest at 7.6%.
Payment due on 24 Feb 2026, funded on 21 Feb 2026 via BoI escrow.
news.summary:
MTNL funds escrow account for 5th semi-annual bond interest at 7.6%.
Payment due on 24 Feb 2026, funded on 21 Feb 2026 via BoI escrow.

news.title:
MTNL fined Rs 7 lakh by TRAI for QoS violations in Aug 2025.
Violations include Call Set up Success Rate and geospatial map issues.
news.summary:
MTNL fined Rs 7 lakh by TRAI for QoS violations in Aug 2025.
Violations include Call Set up Success Rate and geospatial map issues.

news.title:
India Ratings maintained MTNL's NCDs at IND AAA CE on Rating Watch Negative due to GoI payment delays.
No interest payment delays occurred as liquidity was supported by GoI guarantee and trustee monitoring.
news.summary:
India Ratings maintained MTNL's NCDs at IND AAA CE on Rating Watch Negative due to GoI payment delays.
No interest payment delays occurred as liquidity was supported by GoI guarantee and trustee monitoring.

news.title:
MTNL failed to fund the escrow account for its 5th semi-annual interest payment on Bond Series VIIIB.
Despite insufficient funds, Sovereign Guarantee ensures Government of India will cover defaults under the tripartite agreement.
news.summary:
MTNL failed to fund the escrow account for its 5th semi-annual interest payment on Bond Series VIIIB.
Despite insufficient funds, Sovereign Guarantee ensures Government of India will cover defaults under the tripartite agreement.

news.title:
MTNL reported a Q3 FY25 net loss of Rs. 898.4 crore.
Challenges include revenue transfer to BSNL; govt support aids operations.
news.summary:
MTNL reported a Q3 FY25 net loss of Rs. 898.4 crore.
Challenges include revenue transfer to BSNL; govt support aids operations.

news.title:
MTNL funded escrow account for 6th semi-annual interest payment.
Payment for 7.78 MTNL Bond Series VIIC due Feb 10, 2026.
news.summary:
MTNL funded escrow account for 6th semi-annual interest payment.
Payment for 7.78 MTNL Bond Series VIIC due Feb 10, 2026.

news.title:
Telcos' AGR dues reach Rs 1.77 lakh crore by FY25; Vodafone Idea owes Rs 89,952 crore.
Vodafone Idea accounts for nearly half of the AGR liability, as per official data shared with Parliament.
news.summary:
Telcos' AGR dues reach Rs 1.77 lakh crore by FY25; Vodafone Idea owes Rs 89,952 crore.
Vodafone Idea accounts for nearly half of the AGR liability, as per official data shared with Parliament.

news.title:
MTNL fined Rs. 8 lakh by TRAI for failing QoS benchmarks in June 2025.
TRAI cited mismatched performance reports and non-compliance with geospatial coverage map requirements.
news.summary:
MTNL fined Rs. 8 lakh by TRAI for failing QoS benchmarks in June 2025.
TRAI cited mismatched performance reports and non-compliance with geospatial coverage map requirements.

news.title:
MTNL's 6th semi-annual bond interest payment due 10 Feb 2026, offering 7.78% interest.
MTNL couldn't fund escrow due to lack of funds; govt guarantee may cover default.
news.summary:
MTNL's 6th semi-annual bond interest payment due 10 Feb 2026, offering 7.78% interest.
MTNL couldn't fund escrow due to lack of funds; govt guarantee may cover default.

news.title:
MTNL faces Rs 11 lakh penalty by TRAI for non-compliance with Quality of Service regulations for April 2025.
Violations include failure to submit compliance report and publish geospatial coverage maps, with no major financial impact reported.
news.summary:
MTNL faces Rs 11 lakh penalty by TRAI for non-compliance with Quality of Service regulations for April 2025.
Violations include failure to submit compliance report and publish geospatial coverage maps, with no major financial impact reported.

news.title:
MTNL starts auctioning real estate in Mumbai and Delhi to raise funds.
Seven commercial properties and one residential unit are listed for auction.
news.summary:
MTNL starts auctioning real estate in Mumbai and Delhi to raise funds.
Seven commercial properties and one residential unit are listed for auction.

news.title:
MTNL funded the escrow account in Bank of India for 7.59% Bond Series VIII-A interest payment due on 20th Jan 2026.
This compliance aligns with SEBI Regulation 30 of LODR Regulations, 2015. MTNL informed BSE and NSE accordingly.
news.summary:
MTNL funded the escrow account in Bank of India for 7.59% Bond Series VIII-A interest payment due on 20th Jan 2026.
This compliance aligns with SEBI Regulation 30 of LODR Regulations, 2015. MTNL informed BSE and NSE accordingly.

news.title: MTNL's bank borrowings are projected to reach ₹90.36B by Dec 31, 2025.
news.summary: MTNL's bank borrowings are projected to reach ₹90.36B by Dec 31, 2025.
